response:
Subject: Appreciation for the Detailed Response  

Dear Mr. Ivan Klimkovic,  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response. I hope this message finds you well.  

I would like to express my appreciation for the information you provided regarding the current machine vision system, which is equipped with the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C model. I have noticed a potential misunderstanding regarding the image sensor used in this device. According to the technical data attached to this email, the image sensor is specified as the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor.  

I have included the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file in this email. Please refer to page 18 for the detailed datasheet and page 13 for the Quantum efficiency data. I will review these documents thoroughly and provide you with further insights and any additional information I may have.  

Thank you again for your assistance. Please let me know if there is anything else I can assist with.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
